message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) - 1976 Bundestag Election (Cross-sectional survey)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13834","justification":"GLES provides datasets and documentation for German federal elections; the 1976 Bundestag cross-section is a GESIS-hosted DOI entry covering the 1976 election in the 1970s."},{"title":"Elections in the Federal Republic of Germany - 1972 Bundestag Election (MZES/GESIS data)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/permalink/doi:10.4232/1.12960","justification":"GESIS catalogue entry / DOI for a dataset on the 1972 federal election, documenting voting and related variables for Germany in the early 1970s."},{"title":"Elections in the Federal Republic of Germany - 1976 Bundestag Election (Dataseries entry)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/permalink/doi:10.4232/1.13833","justification":"GESIS-hosted dataset DOI for the 1976 federal election; the catalogue entry provides survey data and metadata for the 1970s election."},{"title":"German Bundestag Election Study 1972 - Microdata","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/permalink/doi:10.4232/1.12959","justification":"GESIS DOI entry for microdata from the 1972 Bundestag election, a primary GESIS dataset covering elections in Germany during the 1970s."},{"title":"Elections in the Federal Republic of Germany - 1979 European Parliament Election (West Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/permalink/doi:10.4232/1.14200","justification":"GESIS catalogue DOI for the 1979 European Parliament election data relating to West Germany, relevant to elections in the late 1970s."},{"title":"Politbarometer / Election Surveys (Archive) - 1970s survey data (GESIS search entry)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/","justification":"GESIS data catalogue includes archived election and opinion survey series (e.g., Politbarometer) for the 1970s; use the GESIS catalogue root to locate specific 1970s election survey landing pages and datasets."}]}
